Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
All measured parameters are within normal limits except for a slightly elevated LDL cholesterol and low HDL cholesterol. Glycemic control, renal function, and electrolytes are normal. The lipid profile suggests increased cardiovascular risk; lifestyle modification and further cardiovascular assessment are recommended. No evidence of microalbuminuria.
